title: Calculate and prepare to report the GST/HST - Canada.ca
content:
## Calculate and prepare to report the GST/HST
Get the information you need to calculate your net tax amount, including applicable input tax credits, and how to report GST/HST.

## Services and information

### Calculate your net GST/HST
How to calculate the net tax using the regular or quick method

### Calculate input tax credits
How to recover the GST/HST paid on commercial expenses

### Reporting requirements and deadlines
Who must file a return for each period, and when returns and payments are due

### Which GST/HST return to use in your situation
How and when to report GST/HST in different situations

### Instructions for preparing a return
Line-by-line instructions for completing your return
Documents to keep for your return, input tax credits and rebates

### Certified accounting software
CRA-certified software for preparing and filing a GST/HST return

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
